---
title: "Oyster proteomics and temperature response"
---

# Oyster proteomics and temperature response

Temporal proteomic profiling of developmental and temperature-influenced physiological responses in a bivalve mollusc.

## Project angle

This project examined how biological development and temperature influence proteomic patterns in a marine organism.

## Methods and outputs

- Proteomics
- Developmental biology
- Temperature response
- Biological data analysis

## Publications / outputs

- Temporal proteomic profiling reveals insight into critical developmental processes and temperature-influenced physiological response differences in a bivalve mollusc. Wanamaker, Mitchell, et al. BMC Genomics, 2020.
